channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Evacuation Begins For Hantavirus-Hit Cruise Ship In Spain's Canary Islands

media:content.media:description: No vaccines or specific treatments exist for hantavirus, which is endemic in Argentina.

item.description: Three passengers from the MV Hondius, a Dutch husband and wife and a German woman, have died, while others have fallen sick with the rare disease, which usually spreads among rodents.
item.content:encoded: Three passengers from the MV Hondius, a Dutch husband and wife and a German woman, have died, while others have fallen sick with the rare disease, which usually spreads among rodents.

item.title: Iraq Never Knew Its Desert Was Hiding An Israeli Military Base

media:content.media:description: US Army aviation officials inspect the wreckage of an Apache AH-64D attack helicopter. (Representational)

item.description: The installation housed Israeli special forces and functioned as a logistical hub for the Israeli air force.
item.content:encoded: The installation housed Israeli special forces and functioned as a logistical hub for the Israeli air force.

item.title: ChatGPT's New 'Duty To Warn': Why Your AI Confessor Is No Longer Private

media:content.media:description: OpenAI's Trusted Contact alerts a real person if ChatGPT detects severe distress or self-harm risk

item.description: OpenAI's "Trusted Contact" rollout marks a tipping point: ChatGPT is moving from a silent assistant to a mandatory reporter. Are we ready for the end of the digital confessional?
item.content:encoded: OpenAI's "Trusted Contact" rollout marks a tipping point: ChatGPT is moving from a silent assistant to a mandatory reporter. Are we ready for the end of the digital confessional?

item.title: Hantavirus Update: "This is Not Another COVID" Says WHO Chief In Message To Worried Tenerife Residents
item.description: Many residents on Tenerife remember the fear and disruption of the COVID-19 pandemic and are anxious. Protests have taken place near the planned docking area.
item.content:encoded: Many residents on Tenerife remember the fear and disruption of the COVID-19 pandemic and are anxious. Protests have taken place near the planned docking area.

item.title: US-Iran War News LIVE Updates: 9 Dead As Israel Strikes Lebanon Despite Truce
item.description: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: A US admiral said US forces sank six small Iranian ships. Iran denied any had been sunk and earlier fired warning shots at US warships
item.content:encoded: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: A US admiral said US forces sank six small Iranian ships. Iran denied any had been sunk and earlier fired warning shots at US warships

item.title: Watch: Hungarian Politician's "Cool" Dance At Peter Magyar's Inauguration Goes Viral

media:content.media:description: The video spread quickly across X and YouTube.

item.description: The stunning dance performance on Saturday cemented Zsolt Hegedus' status as Hungary's "dancing politician".
item.content:encoded: The stunning dance performance on Saturday cemented Zsolt Hegedus' status as Hungary's "dancing politician".

item.title: Hantavirus-stricken Cruise Ship Arrives At Tenerife In Spain's Canary Islands

media:content.media:description: There are currently people of more than 20 different nationalities on board the cruise ship.

item.description: Everyone disembarking will be checked for symptoms, and will only be taken off the ship once evacuation flights are ready to fly them to their destinations.
item.content:encoded: Everyone disembarking will be checked for symptoms, and will only be taken off the ship once evacuation flights are ready to fly them to their destinations.

item.title: After Hantavirus Fears, Over 100 Fall Sick In Caribbean Cruise Norovirus Outbreak

media:content.media:description: Princess Cruises described it as "mild gastrointestinal illness".

item.description: Norovirus is a highly contagious virus that causes acute gastroenteritis. Symptoms include sudden vomiting, watery diarrhoea, and stomach cramps.
item.content:encoded: Norovirus is a highly contagious virus that causes acute gastroenteritis. Symptoms include sudden vomiting, watery diarrhoea, and stomach cramps.

item.title: "We Just Hit Somebody": Pilots' Audio Surfaces After Person Killed On US Runway

media:content.media:description: Frontier Airlines said they were investigating the incident

item.description: Denver International Airport said the unidentified person had entered the airport area by jumping over a security fence.
item.content:encoded: Denver International Airport said the unidentified person had entered the airport area by jumping over a security fence.

item.title: Who Was Leo Schilperoord? 'Patient Zero' In Deadly Hantavirus Cruise Ship Outbreak

media:content.media:description: Leo and Mirjam boarded the MV Hondius in Ushuaia on April 1.

item.description: Hantavirus Cruise Ship Outbreak: Leo began showing symptoms, including high fever, headaches and diarrhoea. His condition deteriorated rapidly.
item.content:encoded: Hantavirus Cruise Ship Outbreak: Leo began showing symptoms, including high fever, headaches and diarrhoea. His condition deteriorated rapidly.

item.title: Iran Congratulates Karoline Leavitt On Child's Birth, With A 'Minab' Reminder

media:content.media:description: Karoline Leavitt on Thursday announced the birth of her second child

item.description: Earlier in March, White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said the United States does not target civilians.
item.content:encoded: Earlier in March, White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said the United States does not target civilians.

item.title: Israel Built And Defended A Secret Base In Iraq For Iran War: Report

media:content.media:description: Israel built the installation, which housed special forces and served as a logistical hub. (File)

item.description: Israel set up a clandestine military outpost in the Iraqi desert to support its air campaign against Iran and launched airstrikes against Iraqi troops who nearly discovered it, the
item.content:encoded: Israel set up a clandestine military outpost in the Iraqi desert to support its air campaign against Iran and launched airstrikes against Iraqi troops who nearly discovered it, the

item.title: One Dead After Being Hit By Frontier Airlines Plane That Was Taking Off From Denver
item.description: The incident came a day after a Delta Air Lines employee was killed while on the job at the Orlando International Airport.
item.content:encoded: The incident came a day after a Delta Air Lines employee was killed while on the job at the Orlando International Airport.

item.title: Faint Meow In Mississippi Tornado Rubble Leads To Stunning Rescue

media:content.media:description: Ashton Lemley says there's already a lot of interest from people who want to adopt the kitten.

item.description: The homes were flattened just hours earlier as storms spawned at least three tornadoes across the bottom half of Mississippi, injuring a dozen.
item.content:encoded: The homes were flattened just hours earlier as storms spawned at least three tornadoes across the bottom half of Mississippi, injuring a dozen.

item.title: "Coming To An End": Vladimir Putin On Russia's War With Ukraine

media:content.media:description: The Kremlin said last week that it was for European governments to make the first move.

item.description: Russia's 2022 invasion of Ukraine triggered the most serious crisis in relations between Russia and the West since the 1962 Cuban Missile Crisis, when many people feared the world was on the brink of nuclear war.
item.content:encoded: Russia's 2022 invasion of Ukraine triggered the most serious crisis in relations between Russia and the West since the 1962 Cuban Missile Crisis, when many people feared the world was on the brink of nuclear war.

item.title: US To Revoke Citizenship Of Indian Man Over $2.5 Million Fraud Case

media:content.media:description: These cases were prosecuted by Justice Department's Office of Immigration Litigation

item.description: Debashis Ghosh, 62, is accused of conspiring to defraud investors of $2.5 million intended for the construction of an aircraft maintenance facility, according to a statement by the US Department of Justice.
item.content:encoded: Debashis Ghosh, 62, is accused of conspiring to defraud investors of $2.5 million intended for the construction of an aircraft maintenance facility, according to a statement by the US Department of Justice.

item.title: All Aboard Hantavirus-Hit Ship 'High-Risk Contact', Must Be Monitored: WHO

media:content.media:description: WHO chief Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus is heading to Tenerife to help coordinate the evacuation.

item.description: There are nearly 150 people on board the MV Hondius at the centre of the outbreak that has killed three people, which is heading towards the waters off Tenerife.
item.content:encoded: There are nearly 150 people on board the MV Hondius at the centre of the outbreak that has killed three people, which is heading towards the waters off Tenerife.

item.title: Indian Sailor Dies, 4 Injured After Boat Catches Fire, Sinks Near Hormuz

media:content.media:description: The exact cause of the fire is yet to be ascertained. (Representational)

item.description: The boat was carrying 18 Indian crew members - who were rescued by a vessel that was passing by.
item.content:encoded: The boat was carrying 18 Indian crew members - who were rescued by a vessel that was passing by.

item.title: Handguns Could Soon Be Mailed In The US For First Time In 100 Years

media:content.media:description: USPS proposes allowing mailing of unloaded handguns under new firearms standards.

item.description: New USPS rule could permit shipping handguns securely within states and with restrictions across states.
item.content:encoded: New USPS rule could permit shipping handguns securely within states and with restrictions across states.

item.title: All About Turkey's New 'Yldrmhan' Missile That Can 'Hit' US Mainland

media:content.media:description: Turkey's longest-range missile is currently the Tayfun, which has reached 600 km in tests

item.description: The missile was introduced at the SAHA 2026 Defence and Aerospace Exhibition, but defence experts remain unconvinced about its claimed capabilities.
item.content:encoded: The missile was introduced at the SAHA 2026 Defence and Aerospace Exhibition, but defence experts remain unconvinced about its claimed capabilities.
